content.en:
Time passed, and the battle for the primordial reincarnation stone gradually came to an end.

Although those primordial reincarnation stones were difficult to entangle, many Dao Ancestors paid the price of being injured and still killed these primordial reincarnation stones one by one and obtained their bodies.

And many Dao Ancestors were injured because of this, so they left directly.

After all, they were injured, obviously an injury that even the Primordial Ancient Bead could not heal, and they would not get better in a short time, if they stayed in the No. 13 Ancient Nest, there was a risk of being besieged and killed by other Dao Ancestors.

Don't look at everyone cooperating to attack the Primordial Stone, but they are still competitors and potential enemies.

So, be careful.

Of course, there are still Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao left, such as Canggu Dao Ancestor.

Although Canggu Daozu was also injured, his injuries were not serious, and he still maintained a strong combat effectiveness.

He was looking for Ye Tian and wanted to find Ye Tian's trouble.

However, the No. 13 Ancient Nest was very large, and it was difficult for the will to explore how far here, so it was not easy to find Ye Tian.

......

this day.

Ye Tian found a good treasure that helped to comprehend the Yuan Dao's Qing Dao Cold Stone, this kind of treasure carried on his body could slightly improve his comprehension of the Yuan Dao.

For example, if the Yuan Dao has not reached the realm of Xiaocheng, this kind of Qingdao cold stone still has an effect.

Of course, if the Yuan Dao is raised to the realm of Xiaocheng or above, the Qingdao Cold Stone will be of little use.

And near this Qingdao cold stone, there are three sleeping primordial antiquities, all of which are comparable to the sevenfold primordial ancestors.

Therefore, Ye Tian followed suit, used a copy body to lure away these sevenfold ancestor-level primordial artifacts, and then went to take away the Qingdao Cold Stone himself.

In this way, Ye Tian easily took the Qingdao Cold Stone.

In the following days, Ye Tian used this method to take away the precious treasures that other Dao Ancestors could not take, and he gained more and more.

Of course, the day of departure is getting closer and closer.

Although all Dao Ancestors could stay in the No. 13 Ancient Nest, after a certain period of time, the barriers of the No. 13 Ancient Nest were extremely strong, and even the Eightfold Ancestor was difficult to break.

At that time, they will not be able to leave, and there will be no way for the outside forces to help them break down the barriers and take them out.

So, they have to get out within the allotted time.

If there is a Dao Ancestor who wants to practice here all the time and wait for the next opening, he will definitely die.

The primordial artifacts in the No. 13 Ancient Nest, which are comparable to the Sevenfold Ancestors, will not sleep forever, and will wake up after a certain time.

Once you wake up, you can't avoid it at all, even if you comprehend the half-step sevenfold ancestor of the Ninefold Yuan Dao and break the eighty-one boundaries, you will definitely die.

"Let's try to get some more resources before leaving!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian's harvest was obviously not as good as before, after all, most of the resources were taken away by those Dao Ancestors, and the remaining resources were naturally very scarce.

"These are ......"

Ye Tian saw one drum after another, which was almost exactly the same as the appearance of the Yuanshen drum, but the color was different.

"Genshin Golden Drum!"

Ye Tian quickly recognized it.

The Genshin Golden Drum is the same as the Genshin Drum is a primordial antiquity that belongs to the drum class, but the Genshin Golden Drum is more powerful, the weakest one is comparable to the peak of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and the powerful one is comparable to the half-step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, or even the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor.

And these primordial god golden drums in front of him are all comparable to the peak of the sixfold original ancestor and the half-step sevenfold original ancestor level, and the number is hundreds.

Killing the Genshin Drum can obtain black liquid, which can assist in the initiation of the Yuan Dao, and killing the Yuan Shen Golden Drum can obtain the gold liquid, and the gold liquid can assist in the Yuan Dao.

"I didn't expect that there were still these Yuanshen Golden Drums left, and those Dao Ancestors didn't have the idea of beating these Yuanshen Golden Drums? This is a real treasure!!"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

Maybe these Yuanshen Golden Drums have just been born, after all, the Ancient Nest will randomly give birth to some primordial antiquities, and the primordial antiquities born in the general ancient nest belong to the same category, and the primordial antiquities born in the No. 13 ancient nest are of many kinds, without any rules, so any primordial antiquities can be born.

Of course, it is also possible that these primordial god golden drums are too powerful, and other Dao ancestors dare not provoke them.

At this moment, these primordial god golden drums attacked Ye Tian.

Airplanes!!!

The attacks of these primordial golden drums were superimposed, pointing directly at Ye Tian's Extreme Dao will.

These primordial god golden drums themselves were very terrifying, and coupled with the power of superimposing, they were enough to instantly destroy the weaker Sevenfold Ancestor.

Collapse!

Ye Tian's Extreme Dao will was like a collapsed pyramid, if it was the other half-step sevenfold ancestors, I was afraid that they would really die.

However, Ye Tian possessed the Immortal Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment, so the Extreme Dao will was annihilated and recovered, and in the end he was only slightly injured.

"These Yuanshen Golden Drums are not powerful individually, but they are too terrifying when stacked together! And they are directly aimed at the will of the Extreme Dao, even if the body is extremely strong, it can't withstand their attack! No wonder there is no Dao Ancestor who has the idea of beating them, even if it is a half-step sevenfold original ancestor like Canggu Dao Ancestor, he doesn't dare to provoke these Yuan Shen Golden Drums easily, and he can only flee when he encounters it!"

If it weren't for Ye Tian's possession of the Immortal Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment, coupled with many Primordial Ancient Beads, and his own Extreme Dao Will was extremely strong, plus the Endless Light Shield's obstruction.

Otherwise, he would have just died!

"I won't last long, I must kill them as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian made a quick move and rushed into the Yuanshen Golden Drum Array.

Thundered!!!

The endless golden light penetrated the bodies of the primordial god golden drums one by one, and those primordial god golden drums that were only equivalent to the peak of the sixfold primordial ancestor were directly killed in seconds, and the primordial god golden drums that were comparable to the weaker half-step sevenfold primordial ancestors were also killed in seconds.

However, there are still some Genshin Golden Drums that survived.

Moreover, before those primordial god golden drums fell, they launched another attack on Ye Tian, which caused trauma to Ye Tian again.

Airplanes!!!

Another attack struck, directly causing Ye Tian's Extreme Dao will to be severely damaged.

However, the final winner is still Ye Tian.

Ye Tian directly killed all the primordial god golden drums, and there was only some gold liquid left in the void.

Wow!

Ye Tian waved his hand and collected the gold liquid.

"Fortunately, these primordial god golden drums do not have the immortal Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu, otherwise I would have died this time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although they did not have the Immortal Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment, they did have the Divine Exterminating Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment, and Ye Tian also copied it at the first time.

This Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu is actually the attack method of the Yuan Shen Golden Drum, gathering special power to directly bombard the enemy's Extreme Dao Will Soul and so on.

Of course, a single attack is useless, and it must be stacked to be powerful enough.

Therefore, this Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu is not as good as the Immortal Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu to Ye Tian.

"I'm too injured to stay here anymore, and there's not much time left for the 13th Ancient Nest, so let's just go out!"

Ye Tian took out the key, communicated with the outside world, and soon his body penetrated the barrier of the No. 13 Ancient Nest and returned to the Xuanyu Pavilion of the Star Ancient Giant City.
